title: stachys iva
intro: Stachys iva, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial plant in the mint family that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Stachys iva include reducing fever, soothing coughs, and alleviating digestive problems, as well as promoting relaxation and reducing stress. Stachys iva can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
